comment: Golden retrieval set. Each entry: query as a user/advocate would ask it, the company filter, and what a correct top-k result looks like — matched if any retrieved chunk contains any expect_any substring (case-insensitive) OR its source_url contains expect_url. Eval-only data: never tune prompts or chunking against specific entries.

queries.query: what does the MongoDB Atlas free tier include
expect_any: free tier available for MongoDB Atlas
